dialog: The line now fits perfectly! It passes right in the middle of the dots. Thank you, Master Bias!
You have unlocked extraordinary potential. Bias = freedom of movement. But beware of arrogance.
What arrogance? I am practically infallible!
Exactly that. There is someone out there called the Overfitting Monster. He will promise you 100% accuracy by memorising every detail. Do not give in to his temptation!
